The '''Coyn Route''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="LotE" />

==Description==
This route branched off the [[Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route]] at [[Coyn]] in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]<ref name="PotG3" /> and connected it with the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] at [[Tantra]]<ref name="LotE" /> in the [[Tantra sector/Legends|Tantra sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
The Coyn route was established by [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. A subtle act of defiance, this route isloted [[Derilyn]] economically from the rest of the sector's worlds. Now the main connection of the sector with the rest of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], Coyn became known as the "Gateway to Elrood Sector."<ref name="PotG3" />
